channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Albuterol Sulfate Solution (64980-642-03)
item.description: Albuterol Sulfate, Solution, 2.5 mg/.5 mL (NDC 64980-642-03) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-03 Company: Rising Pharma Holdings, Inc.

item.description: Azacitidine, Injection, 100 mg (NDC 43598-305-62) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-03 Company: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Inc. Available to existing customers

item.description: Vidaza, Injection, 100 mg (NDC 59572-102-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-03 Company: Bristol Myers Squibb Co.

item.description: Desmopressin Acetate (needs No Refrigeration), Spray, 10 ug (NDC 60505-0815-0) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-03 Company: Apotex Corp.

item.title: Current: Flurazepam Hydrochloride Capsule (0378-4415-01)
item.description: Flurazepam Hydrochloride, Capsule, 15 mg (NDC 0378-4415-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-03 Company: Rising Pharma Holdings, Inc. Anticipated availability: Q4 2026; Delay is due to manufacturing delays at the contract manufacturing facility.
